task_description: Find a faculty member in an energy engineering college and view their profile details, including courses, research, publications, and awards.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The central Google search field is active and already contains the text "zhejiang university" in lowercase, with the text cursor at the end. A dropdown of Google search suggestions is open beneath it, including "zhejiang university - Google 搜索", "zhejiang university", "Zhejiang University of Technology", "zhejiang university ranking", and other related entries. In the full Chrome window, this is the Google new tab page with the large Google logo above the search box and standard top-right links and icons visible.
caption.think: The user is entering a university name into Google's main search box to search for that institution. The requested action is typing, likely replacing the default empty field content and completing the query text.
caption.action: Type "ZHEJIANG UNIVERSITY" into the Google search field.
caption.expectation: The search box should contain the typed university name, and Google should continue showing matching autocomplete suggestions beneath it.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed view centers on the Google homepage search box, which contains the text "zhejiang university" with the autocomplete suggestion list expanded below it. The top suggestion is highlighted in light gray and reads "zhejiang university - Google 搜索," followed by suggestions such as "zhejiang university," "Zhejiang University of Technology," and "zhejiang university ranking." No red X is present, indicating this is a keyboard action rather than a click. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open on a new tab page with the large multicolored Google logo above the search field and standard browser controls around it.
caption.think: The query has already been entered, and the next intended step is to submit the search using the keyboard instead of selecting a suggestion with the mouse.
caption.action: Press ENTER to submit the Google search for "zhejiang university."
caption.expectation: Google should load the search results page for "zhejiang university," replacing the autocomplete dropdown with results.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the purple underlined search-result title text "Zhejiang University (ZJU)," which is a clickable hyperlink in the main results list. Above it are the site domain details for zju.edu.cn and language/translate links, and below it is the result snippet text beginning with "Seeking Truth, Pursuing Innovation." In the full-screen Chrome window, this is a Google results page for "zhejiang university," with the Zhejiang University official result on the left and a knowledge panel about 浙江大学 on the right. The target is a UI object in the page content, specifically the main result link.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the official Zhejiang University website from the Google search results by selecting the main titled result link.
caption.action: Click the purple underlined "Zhejiang University (ZJU)" search-result link.
caption.expectation: The link should be activated, and Chrome should navigate from the Google results page to the Zhejiang University website.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the white hamburger menu icon and the adjacent label "MENU" in the website header; this is a UI control in the page's top navigation area, next to the Chinese language label "中文." In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University English homepage is open, showing a large hero image with pink blossoms and a building interior, the Zhejiang University logo at top left, navigation items such as "About," "Education & Research," "Global," "Sustainability," "Discover ZJU," and "News," plus a Google Translate popup near the upper-right area. The click target is specifically the page's MENU control.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the site's navigation drawer or expanded menu to access more website sections from the Zhejiang University homepage.
caption.action: Click the white hamburger "MENU" control in the website header.
caption.expectation: The site menu should open immediately, likely expanding into an overlay, side panel, or dropdown with additional navigation options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the white text link "Schools & Colleges" in the opened site menu overlay. This is a clickable navigation item in the menu content, not a blank area or handle. In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University English site menu is expanded over a dark blue blurred background, with top navigation categories on the left and submenu links on the right; the target is the submenu item under the Education & Research section.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the "Schools & Colleges" page from the expanded Zhejiang University navigation menu.
caption.action: Click the white "Schools & Colleges" menu link.
caption.expectation: The link should become selected and the browser should navigate to the Schools & Colleges page, closing or replacing the menu overlay with the destination page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows no semitransparent red X, consistent with a scroll action, and frames the page itself. The visible browser content is the Zhejiang University "Schools & Colleges" page with a large banner image of a modern building under a blue sky, a big white heading reading "Schools & Colleges," and faint breadcrumb text below reading "Home," "Education & Research," and "Schools & Colleges." In the full-screen Chrome window, the page is loaded at the top, with a vertical scrollbar on the right indicating more content exists further down the webpage.
caption.think: The user likely wants to move down from the top banner section to reveal the actual list or content for schools and colleges on this page.
caption.expectation: The page should move upward, bringing lower sections of the Schools & Colleges page into view beneath the banner.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue underlined text link "College of Energy Engineering" within a vertical list of engineering-related links. This is a clickable text hyperlink, not a blank area or handle. In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University "Schools & Colleges" page is scrolled to the "Engineering" section, with multiple blue links on the left and a large photo of students working with a small tracked robot on the right; the click target is specifically the "College of Energy Engineering" link in the content area.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the page for the College of Energy Engineering from the Engineering section of the Schools & Colleges listing.
caption.action: Click the blue underlined "College of Energy Engineering" link.
caption.expectation: The link should be selected and the browser should navigate to the College of Energy Engineering page or open that college's details.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows a semitransparent red X centered on the top navigation tab labeled "FACULTY" in uppercase dark text, with a short red underline beneath it indicating the current active section. This is a website navigation control in the page header, not a blank region or canvas object. In the full-screen Chrome window, the College of Energy Engineering site is open with a red university header, navigation tabs including HOME, ABOUT, FACULTY, ACADEMICS, RESEARCH, STUDENT LIFE, and INTERNATIONAL, and a large banner image of a traditional building with the overlaid text "ZHEJIANG UNIVERSITY." A small Google Translate popup is visible near the top right, but the click target is clearly the FACULTY tab in the site nav bar.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open or confirm the Faculty section of the College of Energy Engineering website after arriving on the college site.
caption.expectation: The FACULTY tab should be selected, and the page should either remain on the Faculty section if already active or navigate to the Faculty page and refresh the main content below.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped view shows a semitransparent red X centered on the underlined red text link "Cheng Jun" in the faculty name list under the heading "Institute of Thermal Power Engineering (ITPE)." This is a clickable text hyperlink in the page content, not a toolbar item, blank region, or handle. In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University College of Energy Engineering FACULTY page is open, with the site header and top navigation visible and a multi-column list of faculty names in the main content; the target is specifically the "Cheng Jun" name link.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the faculty profile or details page for Cheng Jun from the ITPE faculty list.
caption.action: Click the "Cheng Jun" text link in the faculty list.
caption.expectation: The link should be selected and the browser should navigate to Cheng Jun's profile or personal information page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The view shows the full Chrome page without any red X, consistent with a scroll action. The current page is the Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for CHENG JUN, with a profile card at the top showing the name "CHENG JUN," degree badge "Ph.D.," department "College of Energy Engineering," contact details, research summary, and a QR code. Below that, the tab row has "Biography" selected in blue, and the visible content includes "Research Interests:" and the beginning of "Work Experience:". On the right is a "Related People" sidebar with small portrait cards. A small Google Translate popup is open near the upper-right area. The page has not yet moved further down, so the intended scrollable region is the main webpage content.
caption.think: The user likely wants to continue reading Cheng Jun's profile by moving farther down the biography page to reveal more sections below the currently visible research interests and work experience.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, bringing lower portions of Cheng Jun's profile into view while the top profile header moves further up.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Courses" in the row of profile section tabs. The tab is a rectangular light-gray navigation control between "Biography" on the left and "Research" on the right, so this is a UI control rather than blank page content. In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for Jun Cheng is open; "Biography" is currently highlighted in blue, the main content below shows Research Interests, Work Experience, and Education, and a Related People sidebar appears on the right. The click target is specifically the "Courses" section tab.
caption.think: The user likely wants to switch from the currently visible Biography section to the Courses section of Jun Cheng's personal homepage.
caption.expectation: The Courses tab should become selected, and the page content below should update to show Jun Cheng's course-related information.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the tab labeled "Research" in the row of section tabs. It is a rectangular light-gray tab-style UI control positioned to the right of the currently selected dark-blue "Courses" tab and to the left of "Publications." In the full Chrome window, the Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for Jun Cheng is open. The page currently displays the Courses section with a numbered "Main Courses" list in the center and a right sidebar of related people with portrait thumbnails. The click target is the "Research" tab, which is a page navigation control in the content area, not a blank region or handle.
caption.think: The user likely wants to switch from the currently visible Courses section to the Research section of Jun Cheng's personal homepage.
caption.expectation: The Research tab should become selected, and the main content area should update from the course list to Jun Cheng's research-related information.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the rectangular tab labeled "Publications" in the row of section tabs. It is a light-gray page navigation control immediately to the right of the dark-blue selected "Research" tab and to the left of the next tab beginning with "Sci...". In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for Jun Cheng is open. The main content area still shows the Courses content with a "Main Courses" list, while the tab row displays Biography, Courses, Research, Publications, and Scientific Awards and Honors:. A related-people sidebar with portrait thumbnails is visible on the right. The target is a UI control in the page content area, not a blank region or handle.
caption.think: The user likely wants to switch from the currently selected Research section to the Publications section of Jun Cheng's profile.
caption.expectation: The Publications tab should become selected, and the main content area should update to show Jun Cheng's publication information.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the rectangular tab labeled "Scientific Awards and Honors:". It is a light-gray page section tab immediately to the right of the currently selected dark-blue "Publications" tab, so the target is a UI control in the page content area. In the full-screen Chrome window, the Zhejiang University Personal Homepage for Jun Cheng is open. The main content currently shows a numbered list of publications, and the row of tabs includes Biography, Courses, Research, Publications, and Scientific Awards and Honors:, with related people portrait cards in a right sidebar.
caption.think: The user likely wants to switch from the Publications section to the Scientific Awards and Honors section of Jun Cheng's profile.
caption.action: Click the "Scientific Awards and Honors:" tab.
caption.expectation: The tab should become selected, and the main content area should update from the publications list to Jun Cheng's scientific awards and honors information.
